name: HBIS Resources Co., Ltd.
summary: HBIS Resources Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells a range of bulldozers in China. It also offers wheel loaders, rollers, excavators, pipe layers, etc. The company also exports its products to approximately 90 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as XuanHua Construction Machinery Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to HBIS Resources Co., Ltd. in December 2019. HBIS Resources Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is based in Zhangjiakou, China.
